text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Trainer, listen to this! I saw a dragon last night!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Okay, more specifically, I rewatched my treasured
collection of recorded festival footage!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Festivals around the world are so interesting!
Some have floats, and some have parades that
last all night and through the morning! And...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Well, I accidentally pulled an all-nighter watching
all the videos! Ahaha...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like Kitasan Black didn't get much sleep,
or any rest for that matter...
